title: Protocol for fluorescence-activated droplet sorting (SOP- FADS-001)
author: Robin, Veere
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Standard operating procedure for fluorescence-activated droplet sorting (FADS) developed within 3D-BRICKS (GA #101099125). This protocol documents the methodology for dielectrophoretic sorting of water-in-oil droplets based on fluorescent signal intensity, including instrumentation setup, optical alignment, electrode configuration, signal acquisition and control parameters. Useful for consortium partners and the broader droplet microfluidics community working on fluorescence-activated sorting systems.
